title: Veelgestelde vragen Juvederm | Juvéderm® Netherlands
description: JUVÉDERM® is a collection of injectable facial fillers that can help enhance your facial features by plumping lips, smoothing wrinkles, or restoring lost facial volume. JUVÉDERM® delivers results that look and feel natural as its active ingredient, hyaluronic acid, is naturally occurring in our skin.
